item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.
item.description: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.

item.title: 👎Blythe Chandler - Washington State Association for Justice
item.description: Blythe Chandler signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association for Justice.

item.title: 👍💵Crystal Leatherman - Washington Retail Association
item.description: Crystal Leatherman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Retail Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Marianne Senn Bornhoft - Small Business Owner
item.description: Marianne Senn Bornhoft signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Small Business Owner.

item.title: 👍Meegan Brooks - Benesch Friedlander Coplan & Aronoff LLP
item.description: Meegan Brooks signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Benesch Friedlander Coplan & Aronoff LLP.

item.title: 👍David Carter - Ecommerce Innovation Alliance
item.description: David Carter signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Ecommerce Innovation Alliance.

item.title: 👍Max Martin - Association of Washington Business
item.description: Max Martin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Business.

item.title: 👍Sean DeWitz - Washington Hospitality Association
item.description: Sean DeWitz signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Hospitality Association.

item.title: CPB - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: CPB - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: CPB - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.description: CPB - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.guid: 2026-02-03/CPB - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-13/Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.
item.description: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.title: Floor amendment(s) adopted.
item.description: Floor amendment(s) adopted.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 86; nays, 11; absent, 0; excused, 1.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 86; nays, 11; absent, 0; excused, 1.
item.guid: 2026-02-16/Third reading, passed; yeas, 86; nays, 11; absent, 0; excused, 1.

item.title: First reading, referred to Business, Trade & Economic Development.
item.description: First reading, referred to Business, Trade & Economic Development.
item.guid: 2026-02-18/First reading, referred to Business, Trade & Economic Development.

item.title: 👍Beth Terrell - Board Chair, NW Consumer Law Center
item.description: Beth Terrell signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Board Chair, NW Consumer Law Center.

item.title: ❓Joe Wright - HKM Employment Attorneys, LLP
item.description: Joe Wright signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent HKM Employment Attorneys, LLP.

item.title: 👍💵Crystal Leatherman - Washington Retail Association
item.description: Crystal Leatherman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Retail Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: BTE - Majority; do pass.
item.description: BTE - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Speaker signed.
item.description: Speaker signed.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 43; nays, 5; absent, 0; excused, 1.
